purpose: Defines local validation rules for Delano task status readiness and blocked-state hygiene.

task_rules.description: A ready task must not depend on a local task that is not done.
requires: all local depends_on task statuses are done

task_rules.description: An in-progress task must not start while local dependencies remain unresolved.
requires: all local depends_on task statuses are done

task_rules.description: A done task must not close over unresolved local dependencies.
requires: all local depends_on task statuses are done

task_rules.description: A task must not start or complete while the parent project spec or plan is still planned.
A project with no open tasks must not remain open through stale spec or plan statuses.
A task must not start or complete before its parent workstream has started.
requires: done tasks require workstream.status active or done

task_rules.description: A workstream with no open tasks must not remain open through a stale status.
A blocked task must name who owns unblocking and when to check back.
